name: media-context-mcp
description: Local MCP server to analyze video, audio & images: frames, transcripts, on-screen text. No API keys, no cloud.
author: Vishal Gupta

tools.name: analyze_media
tools.description: Turn a video, audio, or image (file or URL) into model-readable context — frames/montage/filmstrip, speech transcript, and on-screen OCR. Auto-detects the media type.

source.description: Local file path (video/audio/image) or http(s) URL.

detectJumps.description: Track an on-screen number and report jump-back glitches.

tools.name: check_media_deps
tools.description: Report which optional capabilities (URL fetching, transcription, on-screen text) are ready, with setup hints.
